name: news-cms-root
description: Root of the News CMS project

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:public-frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:public-frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:public-frontend
